name: HR teams in small to medium-sized marketing agencies managing 5-15 employees tool
description: For HR teams in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5-15 employees, inefficient scheduling causes missed deadlines. We streamline scheduling instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
target_audience: HR teams in small to medium-sized marketing agencies managing 5-15 employees
problem_solved: Inefficient workforce scheduling and time-off management
